title: Post-Pandemic Future Thinking
html:
Post-Pandemic Future Thinking

A 17-year-old Yahir's pandemic-era futures cluster — March → May 2020 notes asking "what will the next normal look like?" Surprisingly mature framing for the age — touches Chinese tracking apps, India's democratic infrastructure, China hostility-vs-collaboration, Great Depression analogs, "mass move to digital over brick and mortar," contact-tracing as Orwellian surveillance, and post-denial science prioritization.

The 2020 cluster (in order)

  • 2019-09-04 — 2019 09 04 some futuristic shit might happen — earliest "futuristic shit" framing (pre-pandemic, but tonally adjacent)
  • 2020-03-24 — 2020 03 24 exogenous event like 911 already underlined with ropes condi — the "exogenous event like 9/11" frame as the lens
  • 2020-03-30 — 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist — the canonical doc: the watchlist of pandemic-era futures questions
  • 2020-03-30 — 2020 03 30 facebook — sister capture
  • 2020-04-07 — 2020 04 07 what a strange time indeed — "strange time" meta-frame
  • 2020-05-02 — 2020 05 02 things with major upside — pivots from forecasting to opportunity-list
  • 2021-10-28 — 2021 10 28 ar vr metaverse thesis — 18 months later, the metaverse / ar vr thesis is the continuation of this thread

Why it matters in the graph

Two things this cluster proves:

  1. Yahir was already practicing public-futures-thinking at 17. The frame "watchlist of plausible next-normals + my forecast" is the same primitive he later applies to AI search optimization (2024–25) and the AI visibility engine thesis underlying Rankett.

  2. The China-US axis is already on his radar in 2020. "Chinese tracking apps," "China hostility-vs-collaboration" — five years before he actually goes there for Shanghai study abroad. The China chapter isn't an accident — it's the physical execution of a curiosity that's been building since age 17.

The 2020 → 2025 arc is the same brain getting compounding evidence. Worth contrasting directly with the 2025–2026 ai search optimization / pre-AGI clusters.

Connections

surveillance state · china chapter · ai search optimization · ai visibility engine · rankett · ar vr · metaverse · crypto · lineage as fate
